response.overview: In a world where ancient kingdoms have fallen into darkness, a young warrior named Rowan discovers he is the last heir to a forgotten throne. Armed with a legendary sword and hunted by a ruthless warlord, he must unite the scattered realms, uncover the secrets of his bloodline, and face an ancient evil that threatens to consume the world. Along the way, he forms unlikely alliances, battles powerful monsters, and learns what it truly means to be a king.
response.title: The Last Kingdom of Ash
